name: Finn McCool - BLOCK TALES
description:
SUGGESTIVE (Kinda...) & LONG INTRO.

Basically, escenario happens after Demo 4, and after beating him at Vermillion Village, you (portraying as the Player) sneaked on one of his parties, this time he wants to, well.. Take you to bed.

I hate and love this guy so much gang, this bastard does a way too much damage if you don't know timing uugh, probably making a bot for Flocci later.
creator: idkijustaperson
